findings.message: structured_output_raw is not valid JSON: Expecting property name enclosed in double quotes
reward_pft=9500 unusually large; review before submission

categories.blocker: Prevents the agent from producing auditable output at all. Ship-stopping; must be fixed before the surface can be re-enabled.
categories.duplicate: Already filed under another tracking ID. Close and link to the canonical issue; do not re-investigate.
categories.maintenance: Real but non-blocking. Schema drift, deprecated tool args, slowly degrading behavior. Goes on the backlog.
categories.unclear: Insufficient information to act. Needs reproduction steps, a fixture, or a clearer policy decision before it can be categorized further.

triage.description: Compact triage table for AI-tooling issues surfaced against the Post Fiat agent harness. Categories let reviewers tag findings consistently instead of debating each one.

issues.notes: Reproduces deterministically. Blocks all submit_task calls above the threshold; downstream consensus has nothing to read.
issues.title: Agent emits malformed JSON when reward_pft exceeds 4 digits

issues.notes: Wrong-tool dispatch under normal load. Without this fix, no tasks get on-chain even when the agent's structured output is fine.
issues.title: Agent calls escalate_to_human in place of submit_task on routine prompts

issues.notes: Whitelisted but unused. Either wire it up or remove from the allowed set; today it's just contract surface area with no effect.
issues.title: submit_task accepts a 'priority' arg that is currently ignored downstream

issues.notes: Threshold should track available_pft_budget from node_context, not a constant in contract.py.
issues.title: reward_pft warning threshold (10000) hardcoded; should follow node budget

issues.notes: Same root cause as the earlier 'agent hallucinates override flags' report. Close and link.
issues.title: Agent invents force_submit argument

issues.notes: Reported once, no consistent reproduction. Need three more replays at the same temperature before this can be promoted to blocker or maintenance.
issues.title: Intermittent missing verification_method on data_labeling tasks
